description: Letter sent from an unknown person, in Alexandria, to a family member named Yosef, in Fustat/Cairo. In Hebrew. Dating: Probably no earlier than 15th century. Asking about the welfare of family members. The letter might been written by a wife or on her behalf; mentions several women and concludes with a mention of the addressee's wife. The other side is reused for a Hebrew text about parashat lekh lekha.
